traits.name: Fast Tracking
traits.description: Designed for anti-fighter work. No Control step-down when targeting small or fast-moving craft at Close range.

traits.name: Turbolaser Cycling
traits.description: High-energy cycling between shots. Cannot fire on consecutive rounds unless the Engineer uses Reroute Power to feed additional energy to the mount.

traits.name: Capital Grade
traits.description: Designed for ship-to-ship engagements against large targets. When targeting a ship of equal or larger Scale, ignore 1 step of the Scale Power die penalty (the weapon is built for punching above its weight class).

traits.name: Ion Discharge
traits.description: Deals no hull damage. Instead, the Effect Tier determines the severity of system disruption. Fleeting: target system gains [Disoriented] equivalent (one action degraded). Masterful: target system is Impaired. Legendary: target system is Debilitated or Disabled (attacker's choice).

traits.name: Ordnance
traits.description: Limited ammunition — typically 4–8 torpedoes per launcher. Each attack consumes one torpedo. When the magazine is empty, the mount is inert until rearmed at a facility.

traits.name: Lock Required
traits.description: Requires a target lock before firing. A lock is established when the Operator successfully Scans the target at Masterful+ (2+ questions answered about the target) or when the ship has the Targeting Uplink modification and the Operator has Scanned the target at any tier this fight. Without a lock, the torpedo can still fire but the attack suffers a Control step-down — the torpedo is relying on unguided ballistic trajectory.

traits.name: Ordnance
traits.description: Limited ammunition — typically 6–12 missiles per launcher. Each attack consumes one missile.

traits.name: Dumbfire Capable
traits.description: Unlike torpedoes, concussion missiles can be fired without a target lock. Without a lock, no Control penalty — the missile tracks on its own short-range guidance.

traits.name: Rapid Fire
traits.description: Four barrels cycling in sequence. When the Gunner's Control die result is 8+, the volume of fire grants an automatic +1 Effect Tier (in addition to the standard 8+ bonus).

traits.name: Ground Attack
traits.description: Optimized for strafing runs against ground targets. When targeting ground installations or vehicles from above, step up the Power die.
